# Move to gold rocks and gather 24 gold ore
move('Hero', 10, -4)
for _ in range(24):
    gather('Hero')

# Move to strange rocks and gather 40 strange ore
move('Hero', -1, 7)
for _ in range(40):
    gather('Hero')

# Move to magic rocks and gather 2 magical cure
move('Hero', 3, 6)
for _ in range(2):
    gather('Hero')

# Move to cultist acolyte location and defeat 3 of them for cursed books
move('Hero', -1, 13)
for _ in range(3):
    fight('Hero')          # defeats a Cultist Acolyte and drops a cursed_book

# Move to ogre location and defeat 4 ogres for ogre eyes
move('Hero', -5, -5)
for _ in range(4):
    fight('Hero')          # each Ogre drops an ogre_eye

# Move to death knight location and defeat 3 death knights for red cloth
move('Hero', 8, 7)
for _ in range(3):
    fight('Hero')          # each Death Knight drops a red_cloth

# Move to the mining workshop and craft 8 strangold from gathered ores
move('Hero', 1, 5)         # mining station
craft('Hero', 'strangold', 8)

# Move to the gearcrafting workshop and craft the Strangold Legs Armor
move('Hero', 3, 1)         # gearcrafting station
craft('Hero', 'strangold_legs_armor', 1)

# Equip the newly crafted leg armor (unequip existing first)
unequip('Hero', 'leg_armor')
equip('Hero', 'leg_armor', 'strangold_legs_armor')

# Move to the Cultist Emperor and fight him
move('Hero', -2, 13)
fight('Hero')

# Kill chickens for feathers

    move('Hero', 0, 1)
    fight('Hero')

# Kill cows for cowhide
for _ in range(3):
    move('Hero', 0, 2)
    fight('Hero')

# Kill mushmush for mushrooms
for _ in range(4):
    move('Hero', 5, 3)
    fight('Hero')

# Kill red slimes for red slimeballs
for _ in range(2):
    move('Hero', 2, -2)
    fight('Hero')

# Kill yellow slimes for yellow slimeballs
for _ in range(2):
    move('Hero', 1, -2)
    fight('Hero')

# Gather spruce wood (24 pieces)
for _ in range(24):
    move('Hero', 2, 6)   # spruce tree location
    gather('Hero')

# Craft spruce planks (need 3)

craft('Hero', 'spruce_plank', 3)

# Gather iron ore (32 pieces)
for _ in range(32):
    move('Hero', 1, 7)   # iron rocks location
    gather('Hero')

# Craft iron bars (need 4)

craft('Hero', 'iron', 4)

# Craft Adventurer Helmet
move('Hero', 3, 1)       # gearcrafting workshop
craft('Hero', 'adventurer_helmet', 1)

# Craft Fire & Earth Amulet
move('Hero', 1, 3)       # jewelrycrafting workshop
craft('Hero', 'fire_and_earth_amulet', 1)

# Equip the new helmet (replace iron helm)
unequip('Hero', 'helmet')
equip('Hero', 'helmet', 'adventurer_helmet')

# Equip the new amulet
equip('Hero', 'amulet', 'fire_and_earth_amulet')

# Move to the pig and fight
move('Hero', -3, -3)
fight('Hero')

# Move to wolves and defeat 3 of them to collect wolf_bone and wolf_hair
move('Hero', -3, 0)
for _ in range(3):
    fight('Hero')

# Move to skeletons and defeat 3 to collect skeleton_bone
move('Hero', 8, 6)
for _ in range(3):
    fight('Hero')

# Move to red slimes and defeat 12 to collect red_slimeball
move('Hero', 2, -2)
for _ in range(12):
    fight('Hero')

# Move to flying serpents and defeat 9 to collect flying_wing
move('Hero', 5, 4)
for _ in range(9):
    fight('Hero')

# Gather ash wood 21 times
move('Hero', -1, 0)
for _ in range(21):
    gather('Hero')

# Gather birch wood 35 times
move('Hero', 3, 5)
for _ in range(35):
    gather('Hero')

# Gather iron ore 120 times
move('Hero', 1, 7)
for _ in range(120):
    gather('Hero')

# Craft 7 hardwood planks (requires ash_wood and birch_wood)
for _ in range(7):
    craft('Hero', 'hardwood_plank', 1)

# Craft Skeleton Pants (leg armor) which boosts fire damage and HP
craft('Hero', 'skeleton_pants', 1)

# Equip Skeleton Pants (replace current leg armor)
unequip('Hero', 'leg_armor', 1)
equip('Hero', 'leg_armor', 'skeleton_pants', 1)

# Craft 15 iron bars (needed for Fire Rings)
for _ in range(15):
    craft('Hero', 'iron', 1)

# Craft 3 Fire Rings (each needs iron, red_slimeball, flying_wing)
for _ in range(3):
    craft('Hero', 'fire_ring', 1)

# Equip one Fire Ring into ring1 slot
equip('Hero', 'ring1', 'fire_ring', 1)

# Finally, move to Vampire location and fight
move('Hero', 10, 6)
fight('Hero')

# Finally, move to the Cultist Emperor and defeat it

fight('Hero')

for _ in range(16):
    gather('Hero')

# Craft 2 spruce planks

    fight('Hero')

for _ in range(4):
    fight('Hero')

for _ in range(6):
    fight('Hero')

for _ in range(3):
    fight('Hero')

for _ in range(4):
    fight('Hero')

for _ in range(3):
    fight('Hero')

# Equip the new gear

equip('Hero', 'boots', 'adventurer_boots')
equip('Hero', 'ring1', 'life_ring')
equip('Hero', 'ring2', 'earth_ring')

# Move to the pig and fight

fight('Hero')

code:
# ---------- Gather resources ----------
# Ogre resources (need 8 ogre_eye and 8 ogre_skin)
for _ in range(8):
    move('Hero', -5, -5)      # go to an ogre
    fight('Hero')             # defeat ogre, drops ogre_eye and ogre_skin

# Vampire blood (need 5 vampire_blood)
for _ in range(5):
    move('Hero', 10, 6)       # go to a vampire
    fight('Hero')             # defeat vampire, drops vampire_blood

# Skeleton bone (need 4 skeleton_bone)
for _ in range(4):
    move('Hero', 8, 6)        # go to a skeleton
    fight('Hero')             # defeat skeleton, drops skeleton_bone

# Bandit Lizard skin (need 5 lizard_skin)
for _ in range(5):
    move('Hero', 4, 8)        # go to a bandit lizard
    fight('Hero')             # defeat lizard, drops lizard_skin

# Red cloth from Death Knights (need 2 red_cloth)
for _ in range(2):
    move('Hero', 8, 7)        # go to a death knight
    fight('Hero')             # defeat death knight, drops red_cloth

# Jasper crystals (need 3 jasper_crystal)
for _ in range(3):
    move('Hero', 0, 6)        # go to jasper rocks
    gather('Hero')            # gather jasper_crystal

# Dead wood (need 80 dead_wood for 10 dead_wood_plank)
for _ in range(80):
    move('Hero', 9, 8)        # go to dead tree
    gather('Hero')            # gather dead_wood

# Iron ore (need 21 iron_ore for 7 steel)
for _ in range(21):
    move('Hero', 1, 7)        # go to iron rocks
    gather('Hero')            # gather iron_ore

# Coal (need 35 coal for 7 steel)
for _ in range(35):
    move('Hero', 1, 6)        # go to coal rocks
    gather('Hero')            # gather coal

# ---------- Craft intermediate items ----------
# Craft dead wood planks (10 needed)
craft('Hero', 'dead_wood_plank', 10)

# Craft steel (7 needed)
craft('Hero', 'steel', 7)

# ---------- Craft final equipment ----------
# Greater Dreadful Staff
craft('Hero', 'greater_dreadful_staff', 1)

# Lizard Skin Armor
craft('Hero', 'lizard_skin_armor', 1)

# Second Dreadful Ring
craft('Hero', 'dreadful_ring', 1)

# ---------- Equip the new gear ----------
# Unequip current weapon and ring2 (if any)
unequip('Hero', 'weapon')
unequip('Hero', 'ring2')

# Equip Greater Dreadful Staff
equip('Hero', 'weapon', 'greater_dreadful_staff')

# Equip Lizard Skin Armor
unequip('Hero', 'body_armor')
equip('Hero', 'body_armor', 'lizard_skin_armor')

# Equip second Dreadful Ring in ring2 slot
equip('Hero', 'ring2', 'dreadful_ring')

# ---------- Fight the Lich ----------
move('Hero', 9, 7)   # go to the Lich location
fight('Hero')        # defeat the Lich

code:
# 1. Gather iron ore (21)
move('Hero', 1, 7)                     # iron_rocks location
for _ in range(21):
    gather('Hero')

# 2. Gather coal (35)
move('Hero', 1, 6)                     # coal_rocks location
for _ in range(35):
    gather('Hero')

# 3. Fight pigs for pig skin (3)
move('Hero', -3, -3)                   # pig location
for _ in range(3):
    fight('Hero')

# 4. Fight flying serpents for flying wing (2)
move('Hero', 5, 4)                     # flying_serpent location
for _ in range(2):
    fight('Hero')

# 5. Fight skeletons for skeleton bone (6)
move('Hero', 8, 6)                     # skeleton location
for _ in range(6):
    fight('Hero')

# 6. Fight wolves for wolf bone & hair (3)
move('Hero', -3, 0)                    # wolf location
for _ in range(3):
    fight('Hero')

# 7. Gather ash wood (21)
move('Hero', -1, 0)                    # ash_tree location
for _ in range(21):
    gather('Hero')

# 8. Gather birch wood (35)
move('Hero', 3, 5)                     # birch_tree location
for _ in range(35):
    gather('Hero')

# 9. Craft steel (7) at mining workshop
move('Hero', 1, 5)                     # mining workshop location
craft('Hero', 'steel', 7)

# 10. Craft hardwood planks (7) at woodcutting workshop
move('Hero', -2, -3)                   # woodcutting workshop location
craft('Hero', 'hardwood_plank', 7)

# 11. Craft Tromatising Mask (requires steel, pig_skin, flying_wing, skeleton_bone)
move('Hero', 3, 1)                     # gearcrafting workshop location
craft('Hero', 'tromatising_mask', 1)

# 12. Craft Skeleton Pants (requires wolf_bone, skeleton_bone, wolf_hair, hardwood_plank)
craft('Hero', 'skeleton_pants', 1)

# 13. Equip the new gear
unequip('Hero', 'body_armor')          # free the body armor slot
equip('Hero', 'body_armor', 'bandit_armor')
unequip('Hero', 'leg_armor')           # replace leg armor
equip('Hero', 'leg_armor', 'skeleton_pants')
equip('Hero', 'helmet', 'tromatising_mask')   # helmet slot was empty

# 14. Move to the Demon and fight
move('Hero', 1, 13)                    # Demon location
fight('Hero')

for i in range(15):
    gather(Hero)

# Gather birch wood
move(Hero, 3, 5)
for i in range(25):
    gather(Hero)

# Kill skeletons to obtain skulls and bones
move(Hero, 8, 6)
for i in range(4):
    fight(Hero)

# Craft steel (requires mining station)

for i in range(5):
    craft(Hero, steel, 1)

for i in range(5):
    craft(Hero, hardwood_plank, 1)

# Craft Skull Staff (requires weaponcrafting station)
move(Hero, 2, 1)
craft(Hero, skull_staff, 1)

# Equip the Skull Staff
unequip(Hero, weapon)
equip(Hero, weapon, skull_staff)

# Move to Ogre and fight
move(Hero, -5, -5)
fight(Hero)

# Move to copper rocks and gather copper ore (88 times)
move('Hero', 2, 0)
for _ in range(88):
    gather('Hero')

# Move to iron rocks and gather iron ore (112 times)
move('Hero', 1, 7)
for _ in range(112):
    gather('Hero')

# Move to mining workshop to smelt ores into bars
move('Hero', 1, 5)   # mining workshop
craft('Hero', 'copper', 11)   # 11 copper bars
craft('Hero', 'iron', 14)     # 14 iron bars

# Kill 4 Green Slimes for slimeballs
move('Hero', 3, -2)
fight('Hero')  # first green slime
move('Hero', 0, -1)
fight('Hero')  # second
fight('Hero')  # third (stay at same spot)
fight('Hero')  # fourth

# Kill 2 Blue Slimes for blue slimeballs
move('Hero', 0, -2)
fight('Hero')  # first blue slime
move('Hero', 2, -1)
fight('Hero')  # second blue slime

# Kill 3 Cows for cowhide
move('Hero', 0, 2)
fight('Hero')  # first cow
fight('Hero')  # second cow
fight('Hero')  # third cow

# Kill 3 Chickens for feathers
move('Hero', 0, 1)
fight('Hero')  # first chicken
fight('Hero')  # second chicken
fight('Hero')  # third chicken

# Craft gear at appropriate stations
move('Hero', 3, 1)   # gearcrafting workshop
craft('Hero', 'iron_legs_armor', 1)
craft('Hero', 'iron_boots', 1)

move('Hero', 1, 3)   # jewelrycrafting workshop
craft('Hero', 'copper_ring', 1)
craft('Hero', 'air_and_water_amulet', 1)

move('Hero', 2, 1)   # weaponcrafting workshop
craft('Hero', 'sticky_dagger', 1)

# Equip the new equipment (unequip existing where needed)
unequip('Hero', 'weapon')
equip('Hero', 'weapon', 'sticky_dagger')

unequip('Hero', 'boots')
equip('Hero', 'boots', 'iron_boots')

equip('Hero', 'leg_armor', 'iron_legs_armor')
equip('Hero', 'ring1', 'copper_ring')
equip('Hero', 'amulet', 'air_and_water_amulet')

# Finally, move to a Mushmush and fight it
move('Hero', 5, 3)   # first Mushmush location
fight('Hero')

# -------------------------------------------------
# Gather all required raw resources
# -------------------------------------------------
move Hero 1 7                     # iron rocks location
for i in range(86):
    gather Hero                  # gather 86 iron ore

move Hero 1 6                     # coal rocks location
for i in range(50):
    gather Hero                  # gather 50 coal

move Hero 0 6                     # jasper rocks location
for i in range(4):
    gather Hero                  # gather 4 jasper crystal

# -------------------------------------------------
# Hunt monsters for needed drops
# -------------------------------------------------
# Skeletons (need at least 3 kills for skulls and bones)
move Hero 8 6
fight Hero                       # kill 1 skeleton
fight Hero                       # kill 2nd skeleton
fight Hero                       # kill 3rd skeleton

# Wolves (need 6 wolves for bones)
move Hero -3 0
fight Hero                       # kill 1 wolf
fight Hero                       # kill 2nd wolf
move Hero -2 1
fight Hero                       # kill 3rd wolf
fight Hero                       # kill 4th wolf
fight Hero                       # kill 5th wolf
fight Hero                       # kill 6th wolf

# Pigs (need 4 pig skins)
move Hero -3 -3
fight Hero                       # kill 1 pig
fight Hero                       # kill 2nd pig
fight Hero                       # kill 3rd pig
fight Hero                       # kill 4th pig

# Cows (need 4 cowhides)
move Hero 0 2
fight Hero                       # kill 1 cow
fight Hero                       # kill 2nd cow
fight Hero                       # kill 3rd cow
fight Hero                       # kill 4th cow

# Flying Serpents (need 4 wings)
move Hero 5 4
fight Hero                       # kill 1 serpent
fight Hero                       # kill 2nd serpent
move Hero 7 4
fight Hero                       # kill 3rd serpent
fight Hero                       # kill 4th serpent

# Mushmush (need 6 mushrooms)
move Hero 5 3
fight Hero                       # kill 1 mushmush
fight Hero                       # kill 2nd mushmush
move Hero 6 4
fight Hero                       # kill 3rd mushmush
fight Hero                       # kill 4th mushmush
fight Hero                       # kill 5th mushmush
fight Hero                       # kill 6th mushmush

# Red Slimes (need 2 red slimeballs)
move Hero 1 -1
fight Hero                       # kill 1 red slime
move Hero 2 -2
fight Hero                       # kill 2nd red slime

# Blue Slimes (need 2 blue slimeballs)
move Hero 0 -2
fight Hero                       # kill 1 blue slime
move Hero 2 -1
fight Hero                       # kill 2nd blue slime

# -------------------------------------------------
# Craft intermediate materials
# -------------------------------------------------
move Hero 1 5                     # mining station
craft Hero steel 10               # craft 10 steel (uses iron ore & coal)
craft Hero iron 7                 # craft 7 iron bars (uses iron ore)

# -------------------------------------------------
# Craft the required gear
# -------------------------------------------------
move Hero 3 1                     # gearcrafting station
craft Hero skeleton_helmet 1      # needs skull, bones, wolf bone, iron
craft Hero mushmush_jacket 1      # needs cowhide, flying wing, mushroom, jasper crystal

move Hero 1 3                     # jewelrycrafting station
craft Hero ring_of_chance 1       # needs jasper crystal, steel, red/blue slimeballs, pig skin
craft Hero skull_ring 1          # needs steel, wolf bone, skeleton skull, jasper crystal

# -------------------------------------------------
# Equip the new equipment (unequip conflicting items first)
# -------------------------------------------------
unequip Hero body_armor_slot 1    # remove steel armor
equip Hero body_armor mushmush_jacket 1

unequip Hero helmet_slot 1
equip Hero helmet skeleton_helmet 1

unequip Hero ring1_slot 1
equip Hero ring1 ring_of_chance 1

unequip Hero ring2_slot 1
equip Hero ring2 skull_ring 1

# -------------------------------------------------
# Final fight: kill the Bandit Lizard
# -------------------------------------------------
move Hero 4 8                     # location of the Bandit Lizard
fight Hero                       # engage and defeat the Bandit Lizard

move('Hero', -1, 13)
fight('Hero')

code:
# -------------------------------------------------
# 1. Gather all required resources
# -------------------------------------------------

# ----- Cowhide (5) from Cows (0,2) -----
for i in range(5):
    move('Hero', 0, 2)
    fight('Hero')                     # each cow drops 1 cowhide

# ----- Flying Wing (4) and Serpent Skin (4) from Flying Serpents (5,4) -----
for i in range(4):
    move('Hero', 5, 4)
    fight('Hero')                     # each serpent drops 1 wing + 1 skin

# ----- Green Slimeball (5) from Green Slimes (3,-2) -----
for i in range(5):
    move('Hero', 3, -2)
    fight('Hero')                     # each slime drops 1 slimeball

# ----- Jasper Crystal (3) from Jasper Rocks (0,6) -----
move('Hero', 0, 6)
for i in range(3):
    gather('Hero')                    # each gather gives 1 jasper crystal

# ----- Skeleton Bone (6) from Skeletons (8,6) -----
for i in range(6):
    move('Hero', 8, 6)
    fight('Hero')                     # each skeleton drops 1 bone

# ----- Wolf Bone (3) from Wolves (-3,0) -----
for i in range(3):
    move('Hero', -3, 0)
    fight('Hero')                     # each wolf drops 1 wolf bone

# ----- Pig Skin (7) from Pigs (-3,-3) -----
for i in range(7):
    move('Hero', -3, -3)
    fight('Hero')                     # each pig drops 1 pig skin

# ----- Ash Wood (12) from Ash Trees (-1,0) -----
move('Hero', -1, 0)
for i in range(12):
    gather('Hero')                    # each gather gives 1 ash wood

# ----- Birch Wood (20) from Birch Trees (3,5) -----
move('Hero', 3, 5)
for i in range(20):
    gather('Hero')                    # each gather gives 1 birch wood

# ----- Iron Ore (12) from Iron Rocks (1,7) -----
move('Hero', 1, 7)
for i in range(12):
    gather('Hero')                    # each gather gives 1 iron ore

# ----- Coal (20) from Coal Rocks (1,6) -----
move('Hero', 1, 6)
for i in range(20):
    gather('Hero')                    # each gather gives 1 coal

# -------------------------------------------------
# 2. Craft intermediate resources
# -------------------------------------------------

# Steel (4) needed for Skeleton Armor
for i in range(4):
    craft('Hero', 'steel', 1)

# Hardwood Plank (4) needed for Piggy Pants
for i in range(4):
    craft('Hero', 'hardwood_plank', 1)

# -------------------------------------------------
# 3. Craft the three gear pieces
# -------------------------------------------------
craft('Hero', 'lucky_wizard_hat', 1)   # needs cowhide, wing, slimeball, jasper crystal
craft('Hero', 'skeleton_armor', 1)     # needs skeleton bone, wolf bone, pig skin, steel
craft('Hero', 'piggy_pants', 1)        # needs pig skin, hardwood plank, serpent skin, jasper crystal

# -------------------------------------------------
# 4. Equip the new gear (unequip old steel gear first)
# -------------------------------------------------
unequip('Hero', 'body_armor')
unequip('Hero', 'leg_armor')
equip('Hero', 'helmet', 'lucky_wizard_hat')
equip('Hero', 'body_armor', 'skeleton_armor')
equip('Hero', 'leg_armor', 'piggy_pants')
# (optional) equip a steel ring for a tiny extra boost
# unequip('Hero', 'ring1')
# equip('Hero', 'ring1', 'steel_ring')

# -------------------------------------------------
# 5. Move to Bandit Lizard and defeat it
# -------------------------------------------------
move('Hero', 4, 8)      # Bandit Lizard location
fight('Hero')
# -------------------------------------------------

# ---------- Helper functions ----------
def has(item, qty):
    """return True if inventory already contains at least qty of item"""
    return sum(i['code'] == item and i['quantity'] >= qty for i in inventory) > 0

def count(item):
    """current amount of item in inventory (0 if not present)"""
    for i in inventory:
        if i['code'] == item:
            return i['quantity']
    return 0

Successfully created custom character - Hero.

code:
move(Hero, -2, 13)
fight(Hero)

# Move to iron ore location and gather 51 iron ore
move('Hero', 1, 7)
for _ in range(51):
    gather('Hero')

# Move to coal rocks location and gather 85 coal
move('Hero', 1, 6)
for _ in range(85):
    gather('Hero')

# Gather ash wood (36) for hardwood planks
move('Hero', -1, 0)
for _ in range(36):
    gather('Hero')

# Gather birch wood (60) for hardwood planks
move('Hero', 3, 5)
for _ in range(60):
    gather('Hero')

# Kill 13 skeletons for skulls and bones
skeleton_spots = [(8, 6), (8, 8)]
for i in range(13):
    x, y = skeleton_spots[i % 2]
    move('Hero', x, y)
    fight('Hero')

# Kill 5 pigs for pig skins
for _ in range(5):
    move('Hero', -3, -3)
    fight('Hero')

# Kill 5 wolves for wolf bones and wolf hair
wolf_spots = [(-3, 0), (-2, 1)]
for i in range(5):
    x, y = wolf_spots[i % 2]
    move('Hero', x, y)
    fight('Hero')

# Kill 3 flying serpents for flying wings
serpent_spots = [(5, 4), (7, 4)]
for i in range(3):
    x, y = serpent_spots[i % 2]
    move('Hero', x, y)
    fight('Hero')

# Craft steel (17 units) at the mining workshop
move('Hero', 1, 5)               # mining station
craft('Hero', 'steel', 17)

# Craft hardwood planks (12 units) at the woodcutting workshop
move('Hero', -2, -3)             # woodcutting station
craft('Hero', 'hardwood_plank', 12)

# Craft skull staff (fire weapon) at the weaponcrafting workshop
move('Hero', 2, 1)               # weaponcrafting station
craft('Hero', 'skull_staff', 1)

# Craft armor pieces and helm at the gearcrafting workshop
move('Hero', 3, 1)               # gearcrafting station
craft('Hero', 'steel_helm', 1)
craft('Hero', 'skeleton_armor', 1)
craft('Hero', 'skeleton_pants', 1)

# Equip the newly crafted gear
unequip('Hero', 'weapon')
unequip('Hero', 'helmet')
unequip('Hero', 'body_armor')
unequip('Hero', 'leg_armor')

equip('Hero', 'weapon', 'skull_staff')
equip('Hero', 'helmet', 'steel_helm')
equip('Hero', 'body_armor', 'skeleton_armor')
equip('Hero', 'leg_armor', 'skeleton_pants')

# Move to an Ogre and defeat it
move('Hero', -5, -5)             # Ogre location
fight('Hero')

code:
# Move to iron rocks and gather 200 iron ore
move('Hero',1,7)
for i in range(200):
    gather('Hero')

# Move to spruce trees and gather 32 spruce wood
move('Hero',2,6)
for i in range(32):
    gather('Hero')

# Move to jasper rocks and gather 1 jasper crystal
move('Hero',0,6)
gather('Hero')

# Move to chicken and fight enough times to obtain 7 feathers
move('Hero',0,1)
for i in range(20):
    fight('Hero')

# Move to cows and fight 11 times to collect 11 cowhide
move('Hero',0,2)
for i in range(11):
    fight('Hero')

# Move to flying serpents and fight 10 times to collect 10 flying wings
move('Hero',5,4)
for i in range(10):
    fight('Hero')

# Move to green slimes and fight 13 times to collect 13 green slimeballs
move('Hero',3,-2)
for i in range(13):
    fight('Hero')

# Move to yellow slimes and fight 4 times to collect 4 yellow slimeballs
move('Hero',1,-2)
for i in range(4):
    fight('Hero')

# Craft 25 iron bars from iron ore
move('Hero',1,5)   # mining station (forge) location
for i in range(25):
    craft('Hero','iron',1)

# Craft 4 spruce planks from spruce wood
move('Hero',2,6)   # woodcutting station location
for i in range(4):
    craft('Hero','spruce_plank',1)

# Craft all required gear
craft('Hero','iron_dagger',1)          # requires iron + feather
craft('Hero','iron_boots',1)           # requires iron + feather
craft('Hero','adventurer_vest',1)      # requires feather, cowhide, spruce_plank, yellow_slimeball
craft('Hero','lucky_wizard_hat',1)     # requires cowhide, flying_wing, green_slimeball, jasper_crystal
craft('Hero','air_ring',2)             # two air rings
craft('Hero','air_and_water_amulet',1) # requires iron, green_slimeball, blue_slimeball

# Unequip current gear that will be replaced
unequip('Hero','weapon')
unequip('Hero','helmet')
unequip('Hero','body_armor')
unequip('Hero','boots')
unequip('Hero','ring1')
unequip('Hero','ring2')
unequip('Hero','amulet')

# Equip the newly crafted items
equip('Hero','weapon','iron_dagger')
equip('Hero','helmet','lucky_wizard_hat')
equip('Hero','body_armor','adventurer_vest')
equip('Hero','boots','iron_boots')
equip('Hero','ring1','air_ring')
equip('Hero','ring2','air_ring')
equip('Hero','amulet','air_and_water_amulet')

# Move to the Pig location and fight
move('Hero',-3,-3)
fight('Hero')

# Move to the first skeleton and defeat four of them to collect bones and a skull
move('Hero', 8, 6)
for _ in range(4):
    fight('Hero')

# Gather iron ore (15 units)
move('Hero', 1)
for _ in range(15):
    gather('Hero')

# Gather coal (25 units)
move('Hero', 1, 6)
for _ in range(25):
    gather('Hero')

# Gather ash wood (15 units)
move('Hero', -1, 0)
for _ in range(15):
    gather('Hero')

# Gather birch wood (25 units)
move('Hero', 3, 5)
for _ in range(25):
    gather('Hero')

# Craft steel (5 units) at the mining station
move('Hero', 1, 5)   # mining workshop
craft('Hero', 'steel', 5)

# Craft hardwood planks (5 units) at the woodcutting station
move('Hero', -2, -3)  # woodcutting workshop
craft('Hero', 'hardwood_plank', 5)

# Craft the Skull Staff (1 unit) at the weaponcrafting station
move('Hero', 2, 1)    # weaponcrafting workshop
craft('Hero', 'skull_staff', 1)

# Equip the newly crafted Skull Staff
unequip('Hero', 'weapon')
equip('Hero', 'weapon', 'skull_staff')

# Move to the Ogre and defeat it
move('Hero', -5, -5)
fight('Hero')

# -------------------------------------------------
# 1. Gather all required resources
# -------------------------------------------------

# Gather dead wood (need 80 pieces)
for _ in range(80):
    move('Hero', 9, 8)          # dead_tree location
    gather('Hero')

# Gather jasper crystal (need 2)
for _ in range(2):
    move('Hero', 0, 6)          # jasper_rocks location
    gather('Hero')

# Gather gold ore (need 64)
for _ in range(64):
    move('Hero', 10, -4)        # gold_rocks location
    gather('Hero')

# Gather sap (need 1)
move('Hero', -1, 0)             # ash_tree location
gather('Hero')

# -------------------------------------------------
# 2. monsters for drops
# -------------------------------------------------

# Ogre drops: ogre_eye, ogre_skin (need 4 each)
for i in range(4):
    # Alternate between the two ogre spots
    if i % 2 == 0:
        move('Hero', -5, -5)
    else:
        move('Hero', -5, -4)
    fight('Hero')               # kills an ogre

# Vampire drops: vampire_blood (need 8)
for i in range(8):
    if i % 2 == 0:
        move('Hero', 10, 6)
    else:
        move('Hero', 10, 8)
    fight('Hero')               # kills a vampire

# Skeleton drops: skeleton_bone (need 4)
for _ in range(4):
    move('Hero', 8, 6)          # one skeleton location
    fight('Hero')

# Bandit Lizard drops: lizard_skin (need 5)
for _ in range(5):
    move('Hero', 4, 8)          # bandit_lizard location
    fight('Hero')

# Demon drops: demon_horn & piece_of_obsidian (need 7 each)
for _ in range(7):
    move('Hero', 1, 13)         # demon location
    fight('Hero')

# Imp drops: demoniac_dust & piece_of_obsidian (need 3 dust, extra obsidian)
for _ in range(3):
    move('Hero', -1, 12)        # imp location
    fight('Hero')

# Owlbear drops: owlbear_hair (need 7)
for i in range(7):
    if i % 2 == 0:
        move('Hero', 10, 1)
    else:
        move('Hero', 10, 2)
    fight('Hero')

# -------------------------------------------------
# 3. Craft intermediate resources
# -------------------------------------------------

# Craft dead wood planks (10 planks, 8 dead_wood each)
craft('Hero', 'dead_wood_plank', 10)

# Craft gold bars (8 gold, 8 gold_ore each)
craft('Hero', 'gold', 8)

# Craft obsidian bars (6 obsidian, 4 piece_of_obsidian each)
craft('Hero', 'obsidian', 6)

# -------------------------------------------------
# 4. Craft the final equipment
# -------------------------------------------------

craft('Hero', 'greater_dreadful_staff', 1)
craft('Hero', 'gold_helm', 1)
craft('Hero', 'lizard_skin_armor', 1)
craft('Hero', 'obsidian_legs_armor', 1)

# -------------------------------------------------
# 5. Equip the new gear (unequip old gear first)
# -------------------------------------------------

unequip('Hero', 'weapon', 1)                 # remove death_knight_sword
equip('Hero', 'weapon', 'greater_dreadful_staff', 1)

unequip('Hero', 'helmet', 1)                 # remove any helmet
equip('Hero', 'helmet', 'gold_helm', 1)

unequip('Hero', 'body_armor', 1)             # remove bandit_armor
equip('Hero', 'body_armor', 'lizard_skin_armor', 1)

unequip('Hero', 'leg_armor', 1)              # remove piggy_pants
equip('Hero', 'leg_armor', 'obsidian_legs_armor', 1)

# -------------------------------------------------
# 6. Move to the Lich and defeat it
# -------------------------------------------------

move('Hero', 9, 7)          # Lich location in the Graveyard
fight('Hero')               # automatic combat, hero should survive and kill the Lich

# -------------------------------------------------
# End of plan
# -------------------------------------------------

# --- Gather basic resources ----------------------------------------------------
# Move to ash tree location and collect 33 ash_wood
move(Hero, -1, 0)

    gather(Hero)

# Move to birch tree location and collect 55 birch_wood
move(Hero, 3, 5)
for _ in range(55):
    gather(Hero)

# Move to iron rocks and collect 113 iron_ore
move(Hero, 1, 7)
for _ in range(113):
    gather(Hero)

# Move to coal rocks and collect 55 coal
move(Hero, 1, 6)
for _ in range(55):
    gather(Hero)

# --- Gather monster drops ----------------------------------------------------
# Wolves: need 3 wolf_bone + 3 wolf_hair
move(Hero, -3, 0)
for _ in range(3):
    fight(Hero)          # fights the wolf at current location

# Blue slimes: need 9 blue_slimeball
move(Hero, 0, -2)
for _ in range(9):
    fight(Hero)

# Flying serpents: need 3 flying_wing + 3 serpent_skin
move(Hero, 5, 4)
for _ in range(3):
    fight(Hero)

# Skeletons: need 4 skeleton_bone + 2 skeleton_skull
move(Hero, 8, 6)
for _ in range(4):
    fight(Hero)

# Pigs: need 2 pig_skin
move(Hero, -3, -3)
for _ in range(2):
    fight(Hero)

# Mushmush: need 3 mushroom
move(Hero, 5, 3)
for _ in range(3):
    fight(Hero)

# Chickens: need 7 feather
move(Hero, 0, 1)
for _ in range(7):
    fight(Hero)

# --- Craft intermediate materials --------------------------------------------
# Woodcutting station: craft 11 hardwood_plank (6 for battlestaff, 5 for serpent armor)
move(Hero, -2, -3)
craft(Hero, hardwood_plank, 11)

# Mining station: craft 11 steel (for battlestaff & steel legs armor)
move(Hero, 1, 5)
craft(Hero, steel, 11)

# Mining station: craft 10 iron (for rings)
craft(Hero, iron, 10)

# --- Craft final equipment ----------------------------------------------------
# Gearcrafting station: craft serpent_skin_armor and steel_legs_armor
move(Hero, 3, 1)
craft(Hero, serpent_skin_armor, 1)
craft(Hero, steel_legs_armor, 1)

# Jewelrycrafting station: craft life_ring and water_ring
move(Hero, 1, 3)
craft(Hero, life_ring, 1)
craft(Hero, water_ring, 1)

# Weaponcrafting station: craft battlestaff
move(Hero, 2, 1)
craft(Hero, battlestaff, 1)

# --- Equip the new gear ------------------------------------------------------
# Unequip old gear
unequip(Hero, weapon, 1)
unequip(Hero, body_armor, 1)
unequip(Hero, leg_armor, 1)

# Equip new gear
equip(Hero, weapon, battlestaff, 1)
equip(Hero, body_armor, serpent_skin_armor, 1)
equip(Hero, leg_armor, steel_legs_armor, 1)
equip(Hero, ring1, life_ring, 1)
equip(Hero, ring2, water_ring, 1)

fight(Hero)          # defeat the Vampire

# -------------------------------------------------

    fight(Hero)                  # defeat it and obtain a vampire_blood

    fight(Hero)                  # defeat it and obtain a red_cloth

    fight(Hero)                  # defeat it and obtain a skeleton_bone

# 1.e. Gather Dead Wood (need 40 for 5 planks)

# Move to spruce tree location and gather spruce wood (72 needed for 9 spruce planks)

    gather('Hero')

# Craft spruce planks (9)
craft('Hero', 'spruce_plank', 9)

# Move to mining site and gather iron ore (10 needed for 10 irons)
move('Hero', 1, 7)
for _ in range(10):
    gather('Hero')

# Craft iron bars (10)
craft('Hero', 'iron', 10)

# Collect feathers (7) from chickens
move('Hero', 0, 1)
for _ in range(7):
    fight('Hero')   # each chicken yields 1 feather

# Collect cowhides (6) from cows
move('Hero', 0, 2)
for _ in range(6):
    fight('Hero')   # each cow yields 1 cowhide

# Collect mushrooms (4) from mushmush
move('Hero', 5, 3)
for _ in range(4):
    fight('Hero')   # each mushmush yields 1 mushroom

# Collect red slimeballs (3) from red slimes
move('Hero', 2, -2)
for _ in range(3):
    fight('Hero')   # each red slime yields 1 red_slimeball

# Collect yellow slimeballs (3) from yellow slimes
move('Hero', 1, -2)
for _ in range(3):
    fight('Hero')   # each yellow slime yields 1 yellow_slimeball

# Collect green slimeballs (3) from green slimes
move('Hero', 3, -2)
for _ in range(3):
    fight('Hero')   # each green slime yields 1 green_slimeball

# Collect blue slimeballs (3) from blue slimes
move('Hero', 0, -2)
for _ in range(3):
    fight('Hero')   # each blue slime yields 1 blue_slimeball

# Craft gear needed for the fight
craft('Hero', 'adventurer_helmet', 1)
craft('Hero', 'slime_shield', 1)
craft('Hero', 'iron_legs_armor', 1)
craft('Hero', 'iron_boots', 1)

# Equip the new gear (unequip existing where necessary)
unequip('Hero', 'helmet', 1)          # remove iron_helm
equip('Hero', 'helmet', 'adventurer_helmet')
equip('Hero', 'shield', 'slime_shield')
unequip('Hero', 'boots', 1)           # remove leather_boots
equip('Hero', 'boots', 'iron_boots')
equip('Hero', 'leg_armor', 'iron_legs_armor')

# Move to Flying Serpent location and fight
move('Hero', 5, 4)   # first serpent location
fight('Hero')

logs.log: Successfully created custom character - Hero.

code:
# Move to the mining site and collect iron ore
move Hero 1 7
for i in range(160):
    gather Hero

# Move to the spruce trees and collect spruce wood
move Hero 2 6
for i in range(72):
    gather Hero

# Craft spruce planks (9 needed)
craft Hero spruce_plank 9

# Move to the chicken pen and collect feathers
move Hero 0 1
for i in range(11):
    fight Hero   # each chicken drops 1 feather

# Move to the cows and collect cowhides
move Hero 0 2
for i in range(15):
    fight Hero   # each cow drops 1 cowhide

# Move to the Mushmush area and collect mushrooms
move Hero 5 3
for i in range(13):
    fight Hero   # each mushmush drops 1 mushroom

# Move to the yellow slime area and collect yellow slimeballs
move Hero 1 -2
for i in range(10):
    fight Hero   # each yellow slime drops 1 yellow_slimeball

# Move to the flying serpents and collect flying wings
move Hero 5 4
for i in range(3):
    fight Hero   # each flying serpent drops 1 flying_wing

# Move to the red slimes and collect red slimeballs
move Hero 2 -2
for i in range(2):
    fight Hero   # each red slime drops 1 red_slimeball

# Move to the wolves and collect wolf hair
move Hero -2 1
for i in range(4):
    fight Hero   # each wolf drops 1 wolf_hair

# Craft iron bars (20 needed for all gear)
craft Hero iron 20

# Craft all required equipment
craft Hero iron_sword 1
craft Hero adventurer_helmet 1
craft Hero adventurer_vest 1
craft Hero adventurer_boots 1
craft Hero earth_ring 1
craft Hero life_ring 1
craft Hero fire_and_earth_amulet 1

# Equip the new gear (unequip old items first)
unequip Hero weapon 1
equip Hero weapon iron_sword 1

unequip Hero helmet 1
equip Hero helmet adventurer_helmet 1

unequip Hero body_armor 1
equip Hero body_armor adventurer_vest 1

unequip Hero boots 1
equip Hero boots adventurer_boots 1

equip Hero ring1 earth_ring 1
equip Hero ring2 life_ring 1

equip Hero amulet fire_and_earth_amulet 1

# Move to the pig and fight
move Hero -3 -3
fight Hero

# Move to Ash Tree and gather ash wood
move('Hero', -1, 0)
for _ in range(48):
    gather('Hero')

# Move to Birch Tree and gather birch wood

for _ in range(80):

# Move to Woodcutting station and craft hardwood planks (16 needed)

for _ in range(16):

# Gather Green Slimeballs (4 total)

move('Hero', 0, -1)
for _ in range(2):

# Gather Blue Slimeballs (2 total)

for _ in range(1):

move('Hero', -2, 1)
for _ in range(5):

# Gather Pig Skin (4 total)

for _ in range(4):

# Gather resources
# 1. Ogre drops (eye, skin) – need 12 eyes, 7 skins (extra skins are fine)
for _ in range(12):
    move('Hero', -5, -5)   # ogre location
    fight('Hero')

# 2. Vampire drops blood – need 5
for _ in range(5):
    move('Hero', 10, 6)    # vampire location
    fight('Hero')

# 3. Death Knight drops red cloth – need 2
for _ in range(2):
    move('Hero', 8, 7)     # death knight location
    fight('Hero')

# 4. Skeleton drops bone – need 4 bones
for _ in range(4):
    move('Hero', 8, 6)     # skeleton location
    fight('Hero')

# 5. Bandit Lizard drops lizard skin – need 9 skins (already have some from ogres)
for _ in range(9):
    move('Hero', 4, 8)     # bandit lizard location
    fight('Hero')

# 6. Flying Serpent drops wing – need 5 wings
for _ in range(5):
    move('Hero', 5, 4)     # flying serpent location
    fight('Hero')

# 7. Gather dead wood (dead_tree) – need 80 dead wood for planks
for _ in range(80):
    move('Hero', 9, 7)     # dead tree location
    gather('Hero')

# 8. Gather red cloth is already obtained from death knights

# 9. Gather skeleton bone already obtained above

# 10. Gather jasper crystals – need 5
for _ in range(5):
    move('Hero', 0, 6)     # jasper rocks location
    gather('Hero')

# 11. Gather sap – need 1
move('Hero', -1, 0)        # ash tree location
gather('Hero')

# 12. Gather iron ore – need 21
for _ in range(21):
    move('Hero', 1, 7)     # iron ore location
    gather('Hero')

# 13. Gather coal – need 35
for _ in range(35):
    move('Hero', 1, 6)     # coal rocks location
    gather('Hero')

# Craft intermediate items
# 14. Craft dead wood planks (10 needed)
craft('Hero', 'dead_wood_plank', 10)

# 15. Craft steel (7 needed for dreadful ring)
craft('Hero', 'steel', 7)

# Craft final equipment
# 16. Greater Dreadful Staff
craft('Hero', 'greater_dreadful_staff', 1)

# 17. Lizard Skin Armor (body)
craft('Hero', 'lizard_skin_armor', 1)

# 18. Lizard Skin Legs Armor
craft('Hero', 'lizard_skin_legs_armor', 1)

# 19. Dreadful Ring
craft('Hero', 'dreadful_ring', 1)

# Equip the newly crafted gear
# Unequip current weapon and equip staff
unequip('Hero', 'weapon')
equip('Hero', 'weapon', 'greater_dreadful_staff')

# Unequip current body armor and equip lizard skin armor
unequip('Hero', 'body_armor')
equip('Hero', 'body_armor', 'lizard_skin_armor')

# Unequip current leg armor and equip lizard skin legs armor
unequip('Hero', 'leg_armor')
equip('Hero', 'leg_armor', 'lizard_skin_legs_armor')

# Equip the dreadful ring in ring slot 1
equip('Hero', 'ring1', 'dreadful_ring')

# Move to Lich location and fight
move('Hero', 9, 7)          # Lich location in the Graveyard
fight('Hero')

code:
# ------------------- 1. Gather raw resources -------------------
# Gold ore (149 units) – from gold_rocks at (2,0)
move(Hero,2,0)
for i in range(149):
    gather(Hero)

# Strange ore (35 units) – from strange_rocks at (-1,7)
move(Hero,-1,7)
for i in range(35):
    gather(Hero)

# One diamond (also from strange_rocks at the same spot)
gather(Hero)          # assumes the gather yields a diamond

# Topaz (1 unit) – from copper_rocks at (2,0)
move(Hero,2,0)
gather(Hero)

# Dead wood (18 units) – from dead_tree at (9,6)
move(Hero,9,6)
for i in range(18):
    gather(Hero)

# Magic wood (30 units) – from magic_tree at (-3,7)
move(Hero,-3,7)
for i in range(30):
    gather(Hero)

# Magical cure (6 units) – from magic_rocks at (3,6)
move(Hero,3,6)
for i in range(6):
    gather(Hero)

# ------------------- 2. Kill monsters for drops -------------------
# Owlbear hair (3) – owlbear at (10,1)
move(Hero,10,1)
for i in range(3):
    fight(Hero)

# Red cloth (3) – death_knight at (8,7)
move(Hero,8,7)
for i in range(3):
    fight(Hero)

# Demoniac dust (4) – imp at (0,13)
move(Hero,0,13)
for i in range(4):
    fight(Hero)

# Demon horn (7) and additional obsidian pieces (7) – demon at (1,13)
move(Hero,1,13)
for i in range(7):
    fight(Hero)

# Cursed book (3) – cultist_acolyte at (-1,13)
move(Hero,-1,13)
for i in range(3):
    fight(Hero)

# Lizard skin (5) – bandit_lizard at (4,8)
move(Hero,4,8)
for i in range(5):
    fight(Hero)

# Vampire blood (5) – vampire at (10,6)
move(Hero,10,6)
for i in range(5):
    fight(Hero)

# Ogre eye (5) – ogre at (-5,-5)
move(Hero,-5,-5)
for i in range(5):
    fight(Hero)

# ------------------- 3. Craft the needed gear -------------------
# Gold Platebody
craft(Hero,'gold_platebody',1)

# Ancient Jean (leg armor)
craft(Hero,'ancient_jean',1)

# Greater Dreadful Amulet
craft(Hero,'greater_dreadful_amulet',1)

# Topaz Ring
craft(Hero,'topaz_ring',1)

# ------------------- 4. Equip the new gear -------------------
# Replace body armor (old 'strangold_armor')
unequip(Hero,'body_armor',1)
equip(Hero,'body_armor','gold_platebody',1)

# Replace leg armor (old 'gold_platelegs')
unequip(Hero,'leg_armor',1)
equip(Hero,'leg_armor','ancient_jean',1)

# Equip the ring (slot ring1)
equip(Hero,'ring1','topaz_ring',1)

# Equip the amulet (slot amulet)
equip(Hero,'amulet','greater_dreadful_amulet',1)

# (Boots and other slots are kept as they are)

# ------------------- 5. Fight the Reaper -------------------
move(Hero,9,6)          # Reaper location in the Graveyard
fight(Hero)

# Move to the Graveyard to fight Skeletons and collect crafting materials
move(Hero, 8, 6)
fight(Hero)          # defeat Skeleton, collect skeleton_skull and skeleton_bone
move(Hero, 8, 8)
fight(Hero)          # defeat second Skeleton, collect more drops

# Move to the Forest mining station to gather iron ore and coal for Steel
move(Hero, 1, 5)
gather(Hero)         # iron ore
gather(Hero)         # iron ore
gather(Hero)         # iron ore
gather(Hero)         # iron ore
gather(Hero)         # iron ore
gather(Hero)         # coal
gather(Hero)         # coal
gather(Hero)         # coal
gather(Hero)         # coal
gather(Hero)         # coal

# Craft Steel (requires iron ore and coal)
craft(Hero, steel, 1)

# Move to the Forest woodcutting station to gather Ash Wood and Birch Wood for Hardwood Plank
move(Hero, -1, 0)
gather(Hero)         # ash wood
gather(Hero)         # ash wood
gather(Hero)         # ash wood
gather(Hero)         # birch wood
gather(Hero)         # birch wood
gather(Hero)         # birch wood
gather(Hero)         # birch wood
gather(Hero)         # birch wood

# Craft Hardwood Plank
craft(Hero, hardwood_plank, 1)

# Move to the Graveyard to collect more Skeleton drops for the remaining materials
move(Hero, 8, 6)
fight(Hero)          # third Skeleton, more drops

# Craft Skull Staff (requires skeleton_skull, skeleton_bone, steel, hardwood_plank)
craft(Hero, skull_staff, 1)

# Move to the Jewelry crafting station to craft Fire Ring, Skull Ring and Skull Amulet
move(Hero, 1, 3)
craft(Hero, fire_ring, 1)
craft(Hero, skull_ring, 1)
craft(Hero, skull_amulet, 1)

# Move to the Gear crafting station to craft Adventurer Boots
move(Hero, -2, -3)
craft(Hero, adventurer_boots, 1)

# Equip all the crafted items
unequip(Hero, weapon_slot, 1)
equip(Hero, weapon, skull_staff, 1)
unequip(Hero, ring1_slot, 1)
equip(Hero, ring1, fire_ring, 1)
unequip(Hero, ring2_slot, 1)
equip(Hero, ring2, skull_ring, 1)
unequip(Hero, amulet_slot, 1)
equip(Hero, amulet, skull_amulet, 1)
unequip(Hero, boots_slot, 1)
equip(Hero, boots, adventurer_boots, 1)

# Move to the Ogre location
move(Hero, -5, -5)

# Fight the Ogre
fight(Hero)

# ---- Gather resources -------------------------------------------------
# Move to Imp location and farm pieces of obsidian and demoniac dust
move('Hero', -1, 12)
for _ in range(56):          # 56 pieces of obsidian needed
    fight('Hero')            # each Imp drops 1 piece_of_obsidian and 1 demoniac_dust
# (we now also have at least 4 demoniac_dust)

# Pig skins (5)
move('Hero', -3, -3)
for _ in range(5):
    fight('Hero')

move('Hero', 1, 13)
for _ in range(12):
    fight('Hero')

for _ in range(5):

for _ in range(3):

# Owlbear hair (4)

for _ in range(4):

# Ogre eyes (5)

# Ruby (1) – mine from gold rocks

gather('Hero')   # ruby

# Topaz (1) – mine from copper rocks
move('Hero', 2, 0)
gather('Hero')   # topaz

# Diamond (1) – mine from strange rocks
move('Hero', -1, 7)
gather('Hero')   # diamond

# Magical cure (7) – gather from magic rocks

for _ in range(149):

# Strange ore (35) – gather from strange rocks
move('Hero', -1, 7)
for _ in range(35):

# ---- Craft intermediate resources ---------------------------------------
# Move to Mining station to craft Obsidian (14) and Gold (16)
move('Hero', 1, 5)               # Mining workshop
for _ in range(14):
    craft('Hero', 'obsidian', 1)  # each uses 4 piece_of_obsidian
for _ in range(16):

# Move to Woodcutting station to craft Magical Plank (6)

for _ in range(6):

# ---- Craft final gear -------------------------------------------------
# Gearcrafting station for armor and boots
move('Hero', 3, 1)                # Gearcrafting workshop
craft('Hero', 'obsidian_armor', 1)
craft('Hero', 'ancient_jean', 1)
craft('Hero', 'gold_boots', 1)

# Jewelrycrafting station for ring and amulet
move('Hero', 1, 3)                # Jewelrycrafting workshop
craft('Hero', 'topaz_ring', 1)
craft('Hero', 'greater_dreadful_amulet', 1)

# ---- Equip the new gear ------------------------------------------------
# Body armor
unequip('Hero', 'body_armor', 1)
equip('Hero', 'body_armor', 'obsidian_armor', 1)

# Leg armor
unequip('Hero', 'leg_armor', 1)

# Amulet

Successfully created custom character - Hero.

code:
# Move to the first Ogre and collect 4 Ogre Eyes
move(Hero, -5, -5)
for _ in range(4):
    fight(Hero)          # defeats an Ogre → drops ogre_eye

# Move to Death Knights to collect 2 Red Cloths
move(Hero, 8, 6)
for _ in range(2):
    fight(Hero)          # defeats a Death Knight → drops red_cloth

# Move to Vampires to collect 5 Vampire Bloods
move(Hero, 10, 6)
for _ in range(5):
    fight(Hero)          # defeats a Vampire → drops vampire_blood

# Gather 40 Dead Wood (to craft 5 Dead Wood Planks)
move(Hero, 8, 7)         # location of a dead_tree
for _ in range(40):
    gather(Hero)        # each gather gives dead_wood

# Craft 5 Dead Wood Planks at the Woodcutting station
move(Hero, -2, -3)       # Woodcutting workshop
for _ in range(5):
    craft(Hero, dead_wood_plank, 1)

# Move to Skeletons to collect 4 Skeleton Bones
move(Hero8)
for _ in range(4):
    fight(Hero)          # defeats a Skeleton → drops skeleton_bone

# Craft the Greater Dreadful Staff (weapon) at the Weaponcrafting station
move(Hero, 2, 1)         # Weaponcrafting workshop
craft(Hero, greater_dreadful_staff, 1)

# Equip the newly crafted staff (unequip current weapon first)
unequip(Hero, weapon, 1)
equip(Hero, weapon, greater_dreadful_staff, 1)

# Finally, move to a Bat and defeat it

# Helper function to fight a monster at a given location
def fight_at(x, y):
    move('Hero', x, y)
    fight('Hero')

# Blue slime (need 3)

blue_count = 0

    fx, fy = blue_coords[i % len(blue_coords)]
    fight_at(fx, fy)
    blue_count += 1
    i += 1

# Red slime (need 3)
red_coords = [(2, -2), (1, -1)]

    fx, fy = red_coords[i % len(red_coords)]
    fight_at(fx, fy)

# Move to dead tree location and gather dead wood (66)
move('Hero', 9, 8)

for _ in range(30):
    gather('Hero')

# Move to magic rocks location and gather magical cure (7)
move('Hero', 3, 6)
for _ in range(7):
    gather('Hero')

# Move to gold rocks location and gather gold ore (141)
move('Hero', 10, -4)
for _ in range(141):
    gather('Hero')

# Move to strange rocks location and gather strange ore (35)
move('Hero', -1, 7)
for _ in range(35):
    gather('Hero')

# Move to gold rocks location and gather sapphire (2), ruby (1), topaz (1), diamond (1)
# (already at gold rocks, continue gathering)
for _ in range(2):   # sapphire
    gather('Hero')
for _ in range(1):   # ruby
    gather('Hero')
for _ in range(1):   # topaz
    gather('Hero')
for _ in range(1):   # diamond
    gather('Hero')

# Kill demons for demon horns (13)
move('Hero', 1, 13)
for _ in range(13):
    fight('Hero')   # each demon drops one demon_horn

# Kill pigs for pig skins (5)
move('Hero', -3, -3)
for _ in range(5):
    fight('Hero')   # each pig drops one pig_skin

# Kill imps for demoniac dust (4) and piece_of_obsidian (40)
move('Hero', -1, 12)   # first imp location
for _ in range(40):
    fight('Hero')   # each imp drops piece_of_obsidian; first 4 also give demoniac_dust

# Kill bandit lizards for lizard skins (5)
move('Hero', 4, 8)
for _ in range(5):
    fight('Hero')   # each lizard drops lizard_skin

# Kill cultist acolytes for cursed books (3)
move('Hero', -1, 13)
for _ in range(3):
    fight('Hero')   # each cultist drops cursed_book

# Kill vampires for vampire blood (5)
move('Hero', 9, 6)    # first vampire location
for _ in range(5):
    fight('Hero')   # each vampire drops vampire_blood

# Kill ogres for ogre eyes (5)
move('Hero', -5, -5)
for _ in range(5):
    fight('Hero')   # each ogre drops ogre_eye

# -------------------------------------------------
# Craft intermediate resources

# Gold bars (15)

craft('Hero', 'gold', 15)

# Ancient Jean (leg armor)

# Topaz Ring

equip('Hero', 'shield', 'gold_shield')

code:
# -------------------------------------------------
# 1. Gather gold ore (need 128 ore -> 16 gold bars)
move('Hero', 10, -4)          # gold rocks
for i in range(128):
    gather('Hero')

# 2. Gather dead wood (need 64 dead wood -> 8 dead wood planks)
move('Hero', 9, 8)            # dead tree
for i in range(64):
    gather('Hero')

# 3. Gather sap (1) – can be taken from the same dead‑tree location
for i in range(1):
    gather('Hero')

# 4. Gather magical cure (need 3) – from magic rocks
move('Hero', 3, 6)            # magic rocks
for i in range(3):
    gather('Hero')

# 5. Gather ruby (need 1) – from iron rocks
move('Hero', 1, 7)            # iron rocks
for i in range(1):
    gather('Hero')

# 6. Gather piece of obsidian (need 40) – kill Imps (each gives 1 piece)
move('Hero', -1, 12)          # first imp location
for i in range(40):
    fight('Hero')             # each fight drops a piece_of_obsidian and demoniac_dust

# 7. Gather demon horn (need 7) – kill Demons
move('Hero', 1, 13)           # demon location
for i in range(7):
    fight('Hero')             # each fight drops a demon_horn

# 8. Gather demoniac dust (already obtained from Imps above – we have 40, more than enough)

# 9. Gather vampire blood (need 8) – kill Vampires
move('Hero', 10, 6)           # vampire location
for i in range(8):
    fight('Hero')             # each fight drops vampire_blood

# 10. Gather owlbear hair (need 10) – kill Owlbears
move('Hero', 10, 1)           # first owlbear location
for i in range(10):
    fight('Hero')             # each fight drops owlbear_hair

# 11. Gather red cloth (need 5) – kill Death Knights
move('Hero', 8, 7)            # first death knight location
for i in range(5):
    fight('Hero')             # each fight drops red_cloth

# 12. Gather lizard skin (need 4) – kill Bandit Lizards
move('Hero', 4, 8)            # bandit lizard location
for i in range(4):
    fight('Hero')             # each fight drops lizard_skin

# -------------------------------------------------
# 13. Craft dead wood planks (8) from dead wood (8 wood each)
move('Hero', -2, -3)          # woodcutting station
for i in range(8):
    craft('Hero', 'dead_wood_plank', 1)

# 14. Craft gold bars (16) from gold ore (8 ore each)
move('Hero', 1, 5)            # mining station
for i in range(16):
    craft('Hero', 'gold', 1)

# 15. Craft obsidian (10) from piece_of_obsidian (4 each)
for i in range(10):
    craft('Hero', 'obsidian', 1)

# -------------------------------------------------
# 16. Craft Gold Helm
move('Hero', 3, 1)            # gearcrafting workshop
craft('Hero', 'gold_helm', 1)

# 17. Craft Obsidian Legs Armor
craft('Hero', 'obsidian_legs_armor', 1)

# 18. Craft Lizard Boots
craft('Hero', 'lizard_boots', 1)

# -------------------------------------------------
# 19. Craft Ruby Ring (requires gold, obsidian, ruby, vampire blood, magical cure)
move('Hero', 1, 3)            # jewelrycrafting workshop
craft('Hero', 'ruby_ring', 1)

# -------------------------------------------------
# 20. Equip the newly crafted gear (unequip existing items first)

# helmet
unequip('Hero', 'helmet', 1)
equip('Hero', 'helmet', 'gold_helm', 1)

# leg armor
unequip('Hero', 'leg_armor', 1)
equip('Hero', 'leg_armor', 'obsidian_legs_armor', 1)

# boots
unequip('Hero', 'boots', 1)
equip('Hero', 'boots', 'lizard_boots', 1)

# ring2 (replace sapphire_ring)
unequip('Hero', 'ring2', 1)
equip('Hero', 'ring2', 'ruby_ring', 1)

# -------------------------------------------------
# 21. Move to Cultist Emperor and fight
move('Hero', -2, 13)          # Cultist Emperor location
fight('Hero')
# -------------------------------------------------

code:
# -------------------------------------------------
# 1. GATHER RAW RESOURCES
# -------------------------------------------------
# dead wood (90) from the dead tree at (9,8)
move('Hero', 9, 8)
for _ in range(90):
    gather('Hero')

# gold ore (269) from gold rocks at (10,-4)
move('Hero', 10, -4)
for _ in range(269):
    gather('Hero')

# magic wood (30) from magic tree at (-3,7)
move('Hero', -3, 7)
for _ in range(30):
    gather('Hero')

# strange ore (35) from strange rocks at (-1,7)
move('Hero', -1, 7)
for _ in range(35):
    gather('Hero')

# copper ore (for topaz) – need 1 copper ore (topaz is mined from copper/coal/gold rocks)
move('Hero', 2, 0)          # copper rocks location
gather('Hero')               # 1 copper ore (enough for the single topaz)

# sapphire (2) from gold rocks (same location as gold ore)
move('Hero', 10, -4)
for _ in range(2):
    gather('Hero')

# magical cure (8) from magic rocks at (3,6)
move('Hero', 3, 6)
for _ in range(8):
    gather('Hero')

# topaz (1) – already gathered from copper rocks above

# piece of obsidian (32) from imps (drop) – see step 2
# -------------------------------------------------
# 2. KILL MONSTERS FOR CRAFT COMPONENTS
# -------------------------------------------------
# demons (12) for demon_horn
move('Hero', 1, 13)          # demon location
for _ in range(12):
    fight('Hero')

# vampires (12) for vampire_blood
move('Hero', 10, 6)          # first vampire location
for _ in range(6):
    fight('Hero')
move('Hero', 10, 8)          # second vampire location
for _ in range(6):
    fight('Hero')

# wolves (3) for wolf_bone
move('Hero', -3, 0)          # first wolf
for _ in range(2):
    fight('Hero')
move('Hero', -2, 1)          # second wolf
fight('Hero')                # third wolf (only need three total)

# skeletons (3) for skeleton_bone
move('Hero', 8, 6)           # first skeleton
for _ in range(2):
    fight('Hero('Hero', 8, 8)           # second skeleton
fight('Hero')                # third skeleton

# imps (32) for piece_of_obsidian
move('Hero', -1, 12)         # first imp location
for _ in range(16):
    fight('Hero')
move('Hero', 0, 13)          # second imp location
for _ in range(16):
    fight('Hero')

# cultist acolytes (3) for cursed_book
move('Hero', -1, 13)         # cultist acolyte location
for _ in range(3):
    fight('Hero')

# ogres (5) for ogre_eye
move('Hero', -5, -5)         # first ogre
for _ in range(5):
    fight('Hero')

# owlbears (4) for owlbear_hair
move('Hero', 10, 1)          # first owlbear
for _ in range(2):
    fight('Hero')
move('Hero', 10, 2)          # second owlbear
for _ in range(2):
    fight('Hero')

# bandit lizards (5) for lizard_skin
move('Hero', 4, 8)           # bandit lizard location
for _ in range(5):
    fight('Hero')
# -------------------------------------------------
# 3. CRAFT INTERMEDIATE ITEMS
# -------------------------------------------------
# Move to woodcutting station (-2,-3) to craft planks
move('Hero', -2, -3)         # woodcutting workshop

# dead‑wood planks (9)
for _ in range(9):
    craft('Hero', 'dead_wood_plank', 1)

# magical planks (6)
for _ in range(6):
    craft('Hero', 'magical_plank', 1)

# Move to mining station (1,5) to craft bars and alloys
move('Hero', 1, 5)           # mining workshop

# gold bars (39)
for _ in range(39):
    craft('Hero', 'gold', 1)

#idian bars RingHero', 'greater_dreadful_amulet', 1)  # Greater Dreadful Amulet
craft('Hero', 'ancient_jean', 1)         # Ancient Jean
craft('Hero', 'gold_boots', 1)           # Gold Boots

# -------------------------------------------------
# 5. EQUIP THE NEW GEAR (unequip old gear first)
# -------------------------------------------------
# Unequip everything that will be replaced
unequip('Hero', 'shield')
unequip('Hero', 'boots')
unequip('Hero', 'leg_armor')
unequip('Hero', 'ring1')
unequip('Hero', 'ring2')
unequip('Hero', 'amulet')
# Equip the newly‑crafted items
equip('Hero', 'shield', 'gold_shield')
equip('Hero', 'boots', 'gold_boots')
equip('Hero', 'leg_armor', 'ancient_jean')
equip('Hero', 'ring1', 'gold_ring')
equip('Hero', 'ring2', 'topaz_ring')
equip('Hero', 'amulet', 'greater_dreadful_amulet')
# (weapon, helmet, body armor, artifacts remain unchanged)

# -------------------------------------------------
# 6. FIGHT THE REAPER
# -------------------------------------------------
move('Hero', 9, 6)           # Reaper location (Graveyard)
fight('Hero')                # The equipped gear is now strong enough to defeat the Reaper

# -------------------------------------------------
# End of plan
# -------------------------------------------------

# Move to dead wood source and gather 66 dead wood
move('Hero', 9, 8)
for _ in range(66):
    gather('Hero')

# Move to magic tree and gather 30 magic wood
move('Hero', -3, 7)
for _ in range(30):
    gather('Hero')

# Move to gold rocks and gather gold ore (56), ruby (1) and sapphire (2)
move('Hero', 10, -4)
for _ in range(56):
    gather('Hero')
for _ in range(1):
    gather('Hero')   # ruby
for _ in range(2):
    gather('Hero')   # sapphire

# Move to copper rocks and gather 1 topaz
move('Hero', 2, 0)
for _ in range(1):
    gather('Hero')

# Move to strange rocks and gather 1 diamond
move('Hero', -1, 7)
for _ in range(1):
    gather('Hero')

# Move to magic rocks and gather 3 magical cure
move('Hero', 3, 6)
for _ in range(3):
    gather('Hero')

# Kill 40 imps for piece of obsidian (and 4 demoniac dust)
move('Hero', -1, 12)               # first imp location
for _ in range(40):
    fight('Hero')
move('Hero', 0, 13)                # second imp location (if needed)
# (extra fights are harmless; we already have 40 pieces)

# Kill 5 pigs for pig skin
move('Hero', -3, -3)
for _ in range(5):
    fight('Hero')

# Kill 8 demons for demon horn
move('Hero', 1, 13)
for _ in range(8):
    fight('Hero')

# Kill 5 bandit lizards for lizard skin
move('Hero', 4, 8)
for _ in range(5):
    fight('Hero')

# Kill 3 cultist acolytes for cursed book
move('Hero', -1, 13)
for _ in range(3):
    fight('Hero')

# -------------------------------------------------
# Craft intermediate items at appropriate stations
# Woodcutting station for dead wood planks (need 6)
move('Hero', -2, -3)               # woodcutting station
craft('Hero', 'dead_wood_plank', 6)

# Woodcutting station for magical planks (need 6)
craft('Hero', 'magical_plank', 6)

# Mining station for gold bars (need 7)
move('Hero', 1, 5)                 # mining station
craft('Hero', 'gold', 7)

# -------------------------------------------------
# Move to gearcrafting workshop to craft final gear
move('Hero', 3, 1)                 # gearcrafting workshop

# Craft Obsidian Armor, Ancient Jean, Gold Shield
craft('Hero', 'obsidian_armor', 1)
craft('Hero', 'ancient_jean', 1)
craft('Hero', 'gold_shield', 1)

# -------------------------------------------------
# Equip the newly crafted gear (replace current gear)
unequip('Hero', 'shield')
equip('Hero', 'shield', 'gold_shield')

unequip('Hero', 'body_armor')
equip('Hero', 'body_armor', 'obsidian_armor')

unequip('Hero', 'leg_armor')
equip('Hero', 'leg_armor', 'ancient_jean')

# -------------------------------------------------
# Move to Reaper location and fight
move('Hero', 9, 6)                 # Reaper at (9,6)
fight('Hero')

# 1. Gather gold ore (269 units) at gold rocks
move(Hero,10,-4)

    gather(Hero)

# 2. Gather strange ore (35 units) at strange rocks

for i in range(35):
    gather(Hero)

# 3. Gather dead wood (9 units) at dead tree
move(Hero,9,8)
for i in range(9):
    gather(Hero)

# 4. Gather magical cure (5 units) at magic rocks
move(Hero,3,6)
for i in range(5):
    gather(Hero)

# 5. Gather sapphire (2 units) at gold rocks
move(Hero,10,-4)
for i in range(2):
    gather(Hero)

# 6. Gather topaz (1 unit) at gold rocks (or copper rocks)
move(Hero,10,-4)
gather(Hero)

# 7. Move to crafting stations
move(Hero,1,5)          # mining station
craft(Hero,gold,31)     # craft 31 gold bars
craft(Hero,strangold,7) # craft 7 strangold (requires previously gathered strange ore)

move(Hero,-2,-3)        # woodcutting station
craft(Hero,dead_wood_plank,9)   # craft 9 dead wood planks

# 8. Fight monsters for drops
# Vampires for vampire blood (13) and red cloth (5)
move(Hero,10,6)
for i in range(13):
    fight(Hero)      # each vampire gives vampire_blood; red cloth also drops

# Owlbears for owlbear hair (4)
move(Hero,10,1)
for i in range(4):
    fight(Hero)

# Skeletons for skeleton skull (4)
move(Hero,8,6)
for i in range(4):
    fight(Hero)

# Bandit Lizards for lizard skin (3)
move(Hero,4,8)
for i in range(3):
    fight(Hero)

# Ogres for ogre skin (2) and ogre eye (5) – need 5 ogres for 5 eyes
move(Hero,-5,-5)
for i in range(5):
    fight(Hero)

# Demons for demon horn (13)
move(Hero,1,13)
for i in range(13):
    fight(Hero)

# 9. Craft final equipment
move(Hero,3,1)          # gearcrafting station
craft(Hero,gold_sword,1)
craft(Hero,gold_shield,1)
craft(Hero,gold_mask,1)
craft(Hero,gold_platelegs,1)

move(Hero,1,3)          # jewelrycrafting station
craft(Hero,topaz_ring,1)

move(Hero,1,5)          # mining station (again for amulet)
craft(Hero,greater_dreadful_amulet,1)

equip(Hero,weapon,gold_sword,1)

equip(Hero,shield,gold_shield,1)

equip(Hero,helmet,gold_mask,1)

equip(Hero,ring1,topaz_ring,1)

unequip(Hero,amulet,1)
equip(Hero,amulet,greater_dreadful_amulet,1)

fight(Hero)

code:
# --- Gather basic resources ----------------------------------------------------
# Gold ore (need 216)
move('Hero', 2, 0)            # gold_rocks location
for i in range(216):
    gather('Hero')

# Dead wood (need 42 for planks)
move('Hero', 9, 8)            # dead_tree location
for i in range(42):
    gather('Hero')

# Strange ore (need 40)
move('Hero', -1, 7)           # strange_rocks location
for i in range(40):
    gather('Hero')

# Magical cure (need 7)
move('Hero', 3, 6)            # magic_rocks location
for i in range(7):
    gather('Hero')

# Magic wood (need 30)
move('Hero', -3, 7)           # magic_tree location
for i in range(30):
    gather('Hero')

# Ash wood (need 24)
move('Hero', -1, 0)           # ash_tree location
for i in range(24):
    gather('Hero')

# Birch wood (need 40)
move('Hero', 3, 5)            # birch_tree location
for i in range(40):
    gather('Hero')

# Topaz (need 2)
move('Hero', 2, 0)            # copper_rocks (also gold_rocks)
for i in range(2):
    gather('Hero')

# Jasper crystal (need 2)
move('Hero', 0, 6)            # jasper_rocks location
for i in range(2):
    gather('Hero')

# --- Gather drops from monsters ----------------------------------------------
# Vampire blood (need 13)
move('Hero', 10, 6)           # vampire location
for i in range(13):
    fight('Hero')

# Red cloth (need 3) from Death Knights
move('Hero', 8, 7)            # death_knight location
for i in range(3):
    fight('Hero')

# Demon horn (need 9) and Piece of Obsidian (need 32) from Demons
move('Hero', 1, 13)           # demon location
for i in range(32):
    fight('Hero')             # each fight gives 1 demon_horn and 1 piece_of_obsidian

# Owlbear hair (need 7)
move('Hero', 10, 1)           # owlbear location
for i in range(7):
    fight('Hero')

# Cultist Acolyte drops (need 3 magic_stone & 3 cursed_book) 
move('Hero', -1, 13)          # cultist_acolyte location
for i in range(3):
    fight('Hero')

# Bandit Lizard drops (need 5 lizard_skin)
move('Hero', 4, 8)            # bandit_lizard location
for i in range(5):
    fight('Hero')

# Wolves for wolf_hair (need 5)
move('Hero', -3, 0)           # wolf location
for i in range(5):
    fight('Hero')

# --- Craft intermediate materials --------------------------------------------
# Dead wood planks (need 3 for gold sword)
craft('Hero', 'dead_wood_plank', 3)

# Hardwood planks (need 8 for topaz amulet)
craft('Hero', 'hardwood_plank', 8)

# Magical planks (need 6 for ancient jean)
craft('Hero', 'magical_plank', 6)

# Gold bars (need 24)
craft('Hero', 'gold', 24)

# Strangold bars (need 8)
craft('Hero', 'strangold', 8)

# --- Craft final equipment ---------------------------------------------------
craft('Hero', 'gold_sword', 1)
craft('Hero', 'gold_boots', 1)
craft('Hero', 'strangold_armor', 1)
craft('Hero', 'topaz_ring', 1)
craft('Hero', 'topaz_amulet', 1)
craft('Hero', 'ancient_jean', 1)

# --- Equip the gear ---------------------------------------------------------
# Unequip existing gear that will be replaced
unequip('Hero', 'weapon')
unequip('Hero', 'body_armor')
unequip('Hero', 'leg_armor')
unequip('Hero', 'boots')
unequip('Hero', 'ring1')
unequip('Hero', 'amulet')

# Equip new gear
equip('Hero', 'weapon', 'gold_sword')
equip('Hero', 'body_armor', 'strangold_armor')
equip('Hero', 'leg_armor', 'ancient_jean')
equip('Hero', 'boots', 'gold_boots')
equip('Hero', 'ring1', 'topaz_ring')
equip('Hero', 'amulet', 'topaz_amulet')

# --- Final battle ------------------------------------------------------------
move('Hero', -2, 13)          # Cultist Emperor location
fight('Hero')

Successfully created custom character - Hero.

code:
# Move to Dead Tree and gather 66 Dead Wood
for _ in range(66):
    move('Hero', 9, 8)
    gather('Hero')

# Craft 6 Dead Wood Planks (48 Dead Wood needed)
craft('Hero', 'dead_wood_plank', 6)

# Move to Magic Tree and gather 30 Magic Wood
for _ in range(30):
    move('Hero', -3, 7)
    gather('Hero')

# Craft 6 Magical Planks (needs 18 Dead Wood + 30 Magic Wood)
craft('Hero', 'magical_plank', 6)

# Move to Gold Rocks and gather 184 Gold Ore
for _ in range(184):
    move('Hero', 10, -4)
    gather('Hero')

# Craft 23 Gold Bars (8 Gold Ore each)
craft('Hero', 'gold', 23)

# Move to Copper Rocks and gather 2 Sapphire
for _ in range(2):
    move('Hero', 2, 0)
    gather('Hero')

# Move to Magic Rocks and gather 4 Magical Cure
for _ in range(4):
    move('Hero', 3, 6)
    gather('Hero')

# Kill 9 Demons for Demon Horns
for _ in range(9):
    move('Hero', 1, 13)
    fight('Hero')

# Kill 7 Owlbears for Owlbear Hair
for _ in range(7):
    move('Hero', 10, 1)   # first owlbear location
    fight('Hero')

# Kill 3 Death Knights for Red Cloth
for _ in range(3):
    move('Hero', 8, 7)
    fight('Hero')

# Kill 16 Imps for Demoniac Dust (and Piece of Obsidian)
for _ in range(16):
    move('Hero', -1, 12)
    fight('Hero')

# Kill 4 Vampires for Vampire Blood
for _ in range(4):
    move('Hero', 10, 6)
    fight('Hero')

# Kill 3 Cultist Acolytes for Cursed Book
for _ in range(3):
    move('Hero', -1, 13)
    fight('Hero')

# Kill 5 Bandit Lizards for Lizard Skin
for _ in range(5):
    move('Hero', 4, 8)
    fight('Hero')

# Craft 4 Obsidian (requires 16 Piece of Obsidian from Imps)
craft('Hero', 'obsidian', 4)

# Craft the gear needed to defeat the Reaper
craft('Hero', 'gold_shield', 1)
craft('Hero', 'gold_platebody', 1)
craft('Hero', 'gold_boots', 1)
craft('Hero', 'ancient_jean', 1)

# Equip the newly crafted gear (unequip old gear first)
unequip('Hero', 'shield')
equip('Hero', 'shield', 'gold_shield')

unequip('Hero', 'body_armor')
equip('Hero', 'body_armor', 'gold_platebody')

unequip('Hero', 'boots')
equip('Hero', 'boots', 'gold_boots')

unequip('Hero', 'leg_armor')
equip('Hero', 'leg_armor', 'ancient_jean')

# Move to the Reaper and fight
move('Hero', 9, 6)
fight('Hero')

code:
# ==========================
# 1.  Move to resource locations and gather needed raw materials
# ==========================
# Gather dead_wood (40) from the dead_tree at (9,8)
move('Hero', 9, 8)
for _ in range(40):
    gather('Hero')

# Gather gold_ore (192) from gold_rocks at (10,-4)
move('Hero', 10, -4)
for _ in range(192):
    gather('Hero')

# Gather sap (1) from a tree (spruce_tree at 2,6)
move('Hero', 2, 6)
gather('Hero')   # first gather gives sap

# Gather ruby (1) from iron_rocks (used as ruby node) at (1,7)
move('Hero', 1, 7)
gather('Hero')   # ruby

# Gather sapphire (1) from sapphire node (iron_rocks also provides it) at (1,7)
gather('Hero')   # sapphire

# ==========================
# 2.  Kill monsters to obtain required drops
# ==========================
# Ogre eyes (need 4) – ogre at (-5,-5) and (-5,-4)
move('Hero', -5, -5)
for _ in range(4):
    fight('Hero')   # each fight drops one ogre_eye

# Vampire blood (need 18) – vampires at (10,6) and (10,8)
move('Hero', 10, 6)
for _ in range(9):
    fight('Hero')
move('Hero', 10, 8)
for _ in range(9):
    fight('Hero')

# Death Knight for red_cloth (need 7) – death_knight at (8,7) and (10,7)
move('Hero', 8, 7)
for _ in range(4):
    fight('Hero')
move('Hero', 10, 7)
for _ in range(3):
    fight('Hero')

# Skeleton bone (need 4) – skeleton at (8,6) and (8,8)
move('Hero', 8, 6)
for _ in range(2):
    fight('Hero')
move('Hero', 8, 8)
for _ in range(2):
    fight('Hero')

# Owlbear hair (need 7) – owlbear at (10,1) and (10,2)
move('Hero', 10, 1)
for _ in range(4):
    fight('Hero')
move('Hero', 10, 2)
for _ in range(3):
    fight('Hero')

# Demon horn (need 7) – demon at (1,13)
move('Hero', 1, 13)
for _ in range(7):
    fight('Hero')

# Imp for demoniac_dust (need 3) – imp at (-1,12)
move('Hero', -1, 12)
for _ in range(3):
    fight('Hero')

# Demons + Imps for obsidian (need 56 pieces of obsidian => 56 * 4 = 224 piece_of_obsidian)
# We'll get them from the same demon and imp locations.
# First finish the remaining demons (53 more) and imps (0 more needed for dust)
for _ in range(53):
    fight('Hero')   # continue fighting demons at (1,13)

# ==========================
# 3.  Craft intermediate resources
# ==========================
# Craft dead_wood_plank (5 needed for Greater Dreadful Staff)
move('Hero', -2, -3)   # go to woodcutting workshop at (-2,-3)
craft('Hero', 'dead_wood_plank', 5)

# Craft gold bars (24 needed for helm and two rings)
move('Hero', 3, 1)     # go to gearcrafting workshop (used for gold bar crafting)
craft('Hero', 'gold', 24)

# Craft obsidian bars (14 needed)
move('Hero', 1, 5)     # go to mining workshop
craft('Hero', 'obsidian', 14)

# ==========================
# 4.  Craft final equipment
# ==========================
# Greater Dreadful Staff
move('Hero', 2, 1)     # go to weaponcrafting workshop
craft('Hero', 'greater_dreadful_staff', 1)

# Gold Helm
move('Hero', 3, 1)     # gearcrafting workshop
craft('Hero', 'gold_helm', 1)

# Obsidian Legs Armor
move('Hero', 1, 5)     # mining/gearcrafting workshop (assume available)
craft('Hero', 'obsidian_legs_armor', 1)

# Ruby Ring
move('Hero', 1, 3)     # jewelrycrafting workshop
craft('Hero', 'ruby_ring', 1)

# Sapphire Ring
move('Hero', 1, 3)     # same jewelrycrafting workshop
craft('Hero', 'sapphire_ring', 1)

# ==========================
# 5.  Equip the new gear (unequip old gear first)
# ==========================
# Unequip current weapon, helmet, leg armor, rings
unequip('Hero', 'weapon')
unequip('Hero', 'helmet')
unequip('Hero', 'leg_armor')
unequip('Hero', 'ring1')
unequip('Hero', 'ring2')

# Equip the crafted items
equip('Hero', 'weapon', 'greater_dreadful_staff')
equip('Hero', 'helmet', 'gold_helm')
equip('Hero', 'leg_armor', 'obsidian_legs_armor')
equip('Hero', 'ring1', 'ruby_ring')
equip('Hero', 'ring2', 'sapphire_ring')

# ==========================
# 6.  Final battle: defeat the Cultist Emperor
# ==========================
move('Hero', -2, 13)   # location of Cultist Emperor
fight('Hero')          # automatic until the Emperor is defeated

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Gather raw resources
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# dead_wood (from dead_tree at 9,8) – need 48 units for 6 planks
for _ in range(48):
    move('Hero', 9, 8)
    gather('Hero')

# gold_ore (from gold_rocks at 10,-4) – need 77 units
for _ in range(77):
    move('Hero', 10, -4)
    gather('Hero')

# strange_ore (from strange_rocks at -1,7) – need 35 units
for _ in range(35):
    move('Hero', -1, 7)
    gather('Hero')

# sapphire (from gold_rocks at 10,-4) – need 2 units
for _ in range(2):
    move('Hero', 10, -4)
    gather('Hero')

# ruby (from gold_rocks at 10,-4) – need 1 unit
move('Hero', 10, -4)
gather('Hero')

# magical_cure (from magic_rocks at 3,6) – need 3 units
for _ in range(3):
    move('Hero', 3, 6)
    gather('Hero')

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Craft intermediate items
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# dead_wood_plank (8 dead_wood -> 1 plank) – need 6 planks
craft('Hero', 'dead_wood_plank', 6)

# gold (8 gold_ore -> 1 gold bar) – need 7 gold bars
craft('Hero', 'gold', 7)

# obsidian (4 piece_of_obsidian -> 1 obsidian) – need 2 obsidian
craft('Hero', 'obsidian', 2)

# strangold (3 gold_ore + 5 strange_ore -> 1 strangold) – need 7 strangold
craft('Hero', 'strangold', 7)

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Gather monster drops
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# ogre_eye (from Ogre at -5,-5) – need 5
for _ in range(5):
    move('Hero', -5, -5)
    fight('Hero')          # defeat Ogre, drops ogre_eye

# demon_horn (from Demon at 1,13) – need 9
for _ in range(9):
    move('Hero', 1, 13)
    fight('Hero')          # defeat Demon, drops demon_horn

# piece_of_obsidian (from Imp at -1,12) – need 8
for _ in range(8):
    move('Hero', -1, 12)
    fight('Hero')          # defeat Imp, drops piece_of_obsidian

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Craft final equipment
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Gold Shield (requires dead_wood_plank, gold, demon_horn, sapphire, magical_cure)
craft('Hero', 'gold_shield', 1)

# Greater Dreadful Amulet (requires strangold, diamond, ogre_eye, demon_horn, magical_cure)
move('Hero', -1, 7)        # strange_rocks for diamond (already have 1)
gather('Hero')             # gather diamond
craft('Hero', 'greater_dreadful_amulet', 1)

# Sapphire Ring (requires gold, obsidian, sapphire, vampire_blood, magical_cure)
# vampire_blood from Vampire at 10,6 – need 5
for _ in range(5):
    move('Hero', 10, 6)
    fight('Hero')          # defeat Vampire, drops vampire_blood
craft('Hero', 'sapphire_ring', 1)

# Ruby Ring (requires gold, obsidian, ruby, vampire_blood, magical_cure)
# we already have 5 vampire_blood from previous step
craft('Hero', 'ruby_ring', 1)

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Equip gear
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
unequip('Hero', 'shield', 1)               # free shield slot
equip('Hero', 'shield', 'gold_shield', 1)

unequip('Hero', 'amulet', 1)               # free amulet slot
equip('Hero', 'amulet', 'greater_dreadful_amulet', 1)

unequip('Hero', 'ring1', 1)
equip('Hero', 'ring1', 'sapphire_ring', 1)

unequip('Hero', 'ring2', 1)
equip('Hero', 'ring2', 'ruby_ring', 1)

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Move to Cultist Emperor and fight
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
move('Hero', -2, 13)   # location of the Cultist Emperor
fight('Hero')
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------

code:
# Gather wood for hardwood planks
for i in range(24):
    move('Hero', -1, 0)      # ash_tree location
    gather('Hero')

# Gather sap (needed for obsidian legs)
move('Hero', -1, 0)          # ash_tree also yields sap
gather('Hero')               # one sap is enough

# Gather mining resources
for i in range(21):
    move('Hero', 1, 7)      # iron_rocks
    gather('Hero')
for i in range(35):
    move('Hero', 1, 6)      # coal_rocks
    gather('Hero')
for i in range(3):
    move('Hero', 0, 6)      # jasper_rocks (jasper crystals)
    gather('Hero')
move('Hero', 10, -4)         # gold_rocks (ruby drops)
gather('Hero')               # one ruby

# Gather ogre drops (eyes and skins)
for i in range(4):
    move('Hero', -5, -5)    # ogre location
    fight('Hero')
# (4 ogres give at least 4 eyes and 3 skins)

# Gather red cloth from death knights
for i in range(5):
    move('Hero', 8, 6)      # death_knight location
    fight('Hero')

# Gather wolf hair
for i in range(5):
    move('Hero', -3, 0)     # wolf location
    fight('Hero')

# Gather owlbear hair
for i in range(3):
    move('Hero', 10, 1)     # owlbear location
    fight('Hero')

# Gather demon horns
for i in range(5):
    move('Hero', 1, 13)     # demon location
    fight('Hero')

# Gather piece of obsidian (24 total, 5 already from demons above)
for i in range(19):
    move('Hero', -1, 12)    # imp location

# (each imp gives 1 piece_of_obsidian)

# ---------- Crafting ----------
# Mining station (craft steel and obsidian)
move('Hero', 1, 5)           # mining workshop
craft('Hero', 'steel', 7)    # needs iron_ore & coal
craft('Hero', 'obsidian', 6) # needs piece_of_obsidian

# Woodcutting station (craft hardwood planks)

craft('Hero', 'hardwood_plank', 8)

# Gearcrafting station (craft obsidian legs armor)

# Jewelrycrafting station (craft ring and amulet)

craft('Hero', 'dreadful_ring', 1)

# ---------- Equip the new gear ----------
# Replace leg armor
unequip('Hero', 'leg_armor')
equip('Hero', 'leg_armor', 'obsidian_legs_armor')
# Equip ring and amulet
equip('Hero', 'ring1', 'dreadful_ring')
equip('Hero', 'amulet', 'ruby_amulet')
# (Weapon and shield remain as they are)

# ---------- Fight the Lich ----------

fight('Hero')
