# -------------------------------------------------
# 1. Gather resources needed for crafting
# -------------------------------------------------

# Gather dead wood (for dead_wood_plank)
move Hero 9 7          # dead_tree location
for i in range(88):
    gather Hero

# Gather gold ore (for gold bars)
move Hero 10 -4        # gold_rocks location
for i in range(120):
    gather Hero

# Gather demon horns (from demons)
move Hero 1 13         # demon location
for i in range(6):
    fight Hero        # kill 6 demons, each drops a demon_horn

# Gather sapphires (from mining)
move Hero 2 0          # sapphire (copper_rocks) location
for i in range(2):
    gather Hero

# Gather magical cure (from magic rocks)
move Hero 3 6          # magic_rocks location
gather Hero

# Gather ogre eyes and skins (from ogres)
move Hero -5 -5        # ogre location
for i in range(8):
    fight Hero        # 8 ogres for eyes & skins

# Gather vampire blood (from vampires)
move Hero 10 6         # vampire location
for i in range(5):
    fight Hero        # 5 vampires for blood

# Gather skeleton bones (from skeletons)
move Hero 8 6          # skeleton location
for i in range(4):
    fight Hero        # 4 skeletons for bones

# Gather red cloth (from death knights)
move Hero 8 6          # death_knight location
for i in range(5):
    fight Hero        # 5 death knights for red cloth (need 5)

# Gather owlbear hair (from owl bears)
move Hero 10 1         # owlbear location
for i in range(5):
    fight Hero        # 5 owl bears for hair

# Gather demoniac dust (from imps)
move Hero -1 12        # imp location
for i in range(4):
    fight Hero        # 4 imps for dust

# Gather jasper crystals (from jasper rocks)
move Hero 0 6          # jasper_rocks location
for i in range(3):
    gather Hero

# Gather emerald (from emerald rocks)
move Hero 2 0          # emerald_rocks location
gather Hero

# Gather wolf hair (from wolves)
move Hero -3 0         # wolf location
for i in range(5):
    fight Hero        # 5 wolves for hair

# Gather ash wood (for hardwood planks)
move Hero -1 0         # ash_tree location
for i in range(24):
    gather Hero

# Gather birch wood (for hardwood planks)
move Hero -1 6         # birch_tree location
for i in range(40):
    gather Hero

# Gather iron ore (for steel)
move Hero 1 7          # iron_rocks location
for i in range(21):
    gather Hero

# Gather coal (for steel)
move Hero 1 6          # coal_rocks location
for i in range(35):
    gather Hero

# -------------------------------------------------
# 2. Craft intermediate resources
# -------------------------------------------------

# Craft dead_wood_plank (needs 8 dead_wood each)
move Hero -2 -3        # woodcutting workshop
craft Hero dead_wood_plank 11   # 11 planks (6 for shield, 5 for staff)

# Craft gold bars (needs 8 gold_ore each)
move Hero 3 1          # gearcrafting workshop
craft Hero gold 15

# Craft steel (needs iron_ore and coal)
move Hero 1 5          # mining workshop
craft Hero steel 7

# Craft hardwood_plank (needs ash_wood and birch_wood)
move Hero -2 -3        # woodcutting workshop
craft Hero hardwood_plank 8

# Craft piece_of_obsidian (not needed in this plan, skip)

# -------------------------------------------------
# 3. Craft final equipment
# -------------------------------------------------

# Craft Greater Dreadful Staff
move Hero 2 1          # weaponcrafting workshop
craft Hero greater_dreadful_staff 1

# Craft Gold Shield
move Hero 3 1          # gearcrafting workshop
craft Hero gold_shield 1

# Craft Dreadful Ring
move Hero 1 3          # jewelrycrafting workshop
craft Hero dreadful_ring 1

# Craft Emerald Amulet
move Hero 1 3          # jewelrycrafting workshop
craft Hero emerald_amulet 1

# -------------------------------------------------
# 4. Equip the new gear (unequip old items first)
# -------------------------------------------------

# Unequip current weapon and shield
unequip Hero weapon 1
unequip Hero shield 1

# Equip the newly crafted items
equip Hero weapon greater_dreadful_staff 1
equip Hero shield gold_shield 1
equip Hero ring1 dreadful_ring 1
equip Hero amulet emerald_amulet 1

# (Other slots remain as they were: helmet, body_armor, leg_armor, boots)

# -------------------------------------------------
# 5. Move to the Lich and fight
# -------------------------------------------------

move Hero 9 7          # Lich location
fight Hero

# 1. Gather dead_wood (40) at the dead‑tree node (-1, 8)
for _ in range(40):
    move('Hero', -1, 8)
    gather('Hero')

# 2. Gather sap (1) at an ash‑tree node (-1, 0)
move('Hero', -1, 0)
gather('Hero')

# 3. Craft dead_wood_plank (5)
craft('Hero', 'dead_wood_plank', 5)

# 4. Gather gold_ore (8) at gold rocks (10, -4)
for _ in range(8):
    move('Hero', 10, -4)
    gather('Hero')
# Craft gold bars (8)
craft('Hero', 'gold', 8)

# 5. Gather piece_of_obsidian (24) – 8 from each of the 3 imp/demon spawns
obsidian_sources = [(-1, 12), (0, 13), (1, 13)]
for x, y in obsidian_sources:
    for _ in range(8):
        move('Hero', x, y)
        gather('Hero')
# Craft obsidian (6)
craft('Hero', 'obsidian', 6)

# 6. Kill Ogres for ogre_eye (4) and red_cloth (5)
for i in range(5):          # 5 Ogres gives enough eyes and cloth
    move('Hero', -5, -5)
    fight('Hero')

# 7. Kill Skeletons for skeleton_bone (4)
for i in range(4):
    move('Hero', 8, 6)
    fight('Hero')

# 8. Kill Vampires for vampire_blood (10)
for i in range(10):
    move('Hero', 10, 6)
    fight('Hero')

# 9. Kill Owlbears for owlbear_hair (6)
for i in range(6):
    move('Hero', 10, 1)
    fight('Hero')

# 10. Kill Bandit Lizards for lizard_skin (5)
for i in range(5):
    move('Hero', 4, 8)
    fight('Hero')

# 11. Kill Imps for demoniac_dust (4) – each Imp drops 1
for i in range(4):
    move('Hero', -1, 12)
    fight('Hero')

# 12. Kill Demons for demon_horn (2)
for i in range(2):
    move('Hero', 1, 13)
    fight('Hero')

# 13. Craft the three pieces of equipment
craft('Hero', 'greater_dreadful_staff', 1)
craft('Hero', 'obsidian_helmet', 1)
craft('Hero', 'gold_platebody', 1)

# 14. Equip the new gear (unequip current weapon, helmet, body armor first)
unequip('Hero', 'weapon')
unequip('Hero', 'helmet')
unequip('Hero', 'body_armor')
equip('Hero', 'weapon', 'greater_dreadful_staff')
equip('Hero', 'helmet', 'obsidian_helmet')
equip('Hero', 'body_armor', 'gold_platebody')

# 15. Move to the Bat and fight
move('Hero', 11, 7)
fight('Hero')
